reviews.author: Anu Mahajan
reviews.review_body: Dharam public school is the good school with excellent management and have good skillful and knowledgeable teachers.  Who help the students to find the right path in there career

reviews.school_name: DHARM PUBLIC SCHOOL - Knowledge Park I
reviews.author: mehak rawat
reviews.review_body: Dharam public school provides quality education to the learners.The teacher focuses on the overall development of the students and provide them a safe and learning environment.Instead of focusing on the rote learning teacher's main focus is on conceptual learning.

reviews.school_name: DHARM PUBLIC SCHOOL - Knowledge Park I
reviews.author: urmi bhardwaj
reviews.review_body: Dharam public school provide a better platform of education for  students.The staff also focus on the personality of the students and works to remove the inner darkness of illiteracy and fills the light of knowledge in the inner will of the student.

reviews.school_name: DHARM PUBLIC SCHOOL - Knowledge Park I
reviews.author: Diksha Awana
reviews.review_body:
#Dharam public school# is a name of such a institute where the basic agenda is to provide quality education to students..
Teacher are very friendly and full of "ready to help nature "
Results in children with academic excellence are rooted here!!!
Best place for your child's brighter future !

reviews.school_name: DHARM PUBLIC SCHOOL - Knowledge Park I
reviews.author: Bhuwan Gaur
reviews.review_body:
School reputation is meant with good management and educated teacher staff ...
In this school, nurturing of teacher is so much affective ...all the teachers teach as a prime responsibility for educating students .
All teachers are highly qualified with
excellent teaching skill ...
